result.title: AI Is Being Built Into New Homes
result.description:
Your future home might come with an AI supercomputer built into the wall.

NVIDIA, Pulte Group, and startup SPAN are working on homes with built-in mini data centers packed with Blackwell GPUs, AMD CPUs, and terabytes of RAM.

So in the future, your house could potentially run your own personal AI locally and maybe even rent out unused compute power to companies like OpenAI or Anthropic when you’re not using it.

Would you want this in your home? 

#ai #ainews

result.title: Codex Now Has "AI Pets"
result.description:
OpenAI keeps saying they’re cutting these random “side quests" and YET...

they just shipped AI PETS inside Codex 🤔 😂

You can now hatch little custom characters that live inside your coding environment, run around your screen, and even import pets other people created.

This might be one of the most unnecessary AI features ever made.

And I kind of love it 🤷🏻‍♂️

Would you actually use this or is this too much silliness for you? 

#AI #OpenAI #Codex #AInews

result.title: Your AI Setup Needs This
result.description:
If you’re serious about AI, your laptop matters more than you think.

Most people are running powerful AI tools on hardware that’s holding them back. But what if your laptop could actually run AI on-device faster, more securely, and way more efficiently?

That’s what @amd is offering with their AMD Ryzen™ AI PRO chips that are built specifically for businesses and AI workflows.

It has:
⚡ Faster performance
🔒 Built-in security
🔋 Better battery life
🧠 AI-ready hardware

And right now you can even test one out completely for free.

If you’re running a business or just want to seriously level up your AI workflow, check out the world’s best processor for enterprise AI here: https://ryzen.pro/en/laptop/?utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=q126_032pi%20&utm_content=mattwolfe
